final_text:
Here's a summary of the relevant remote jobs I found for your **Go** skills:

---

**1. Senior Independent Software Developer** — A.Team
🌍 Remote (Americas, Europe, Israel)
💰 $90–$150/hr
🔗 https://remotive.com/remote-jobs/software-development/senior-independent-software-developer-1919265

**2. Senior Independent AI Engineer / Architect** — A.Team
🌍 Remote (Americas, Europe, Israel)
💰 $120–$170/hr
🔗 https://remotive.com/remote-jobs/software-development/senior-independent-ai-engineer-architect-1919266

**3. Senior Full-stack React Developer** — Lemon.io
🌍 Remote (Worldwide)
💰 Salary not disclosed
🔗 https://remotive.com/remote-jobs/software-development/senior-full-stack-react-developer-2088711

**4. Senior DevOps Engineer** — Lemon.io
🌍 Remote (Worldwide)
💰 Salary not disclosed
🔗 https://remotive.com/remote-jobs/devops/senior-devops-engineer-2090002

---

All four are fully remote positions. The A.Team roles explicitly list **Go** in their tech stack, while the Lemon.io roles list **Golang** among their many tags — so your Go skills are a match. The A.Team roles also have transparent hourly rates, which is a plus. No relevant Go positions were found in the European (Arbeitnow) listings.
